case_study.title: CryptoDash Pro: Engineering a Zero-Downtime, High-Performance Crypto Trading Terminal
case_study.executive_summary: Modernizing a legacy cryptocurrency tracker into an institutional-grade, responsive 3-column trading terminal. By integrating React Query caching, client-side WebSocket streams, Next.js dynamic API middleware, and progressive web capabilities, the terminal offers high-performance live data updates with a zero-downtime structural fallback layer.

challenges.description: Public API tiers impose strict rate limits which previously caused the entire interface to crash or remain empty when exceeded during active market periods.
challenges.solution: Built a server-side resilient proxy middleware that intercepts 429 blocks and dynamically serves a local high-performance INR-based backup cache. Every price, volume, high/low, and market cap metric is mathematically converted on-the-fly to the active global currency configuration (USD, EUR, YEN, INR) using live approximate forex ratios before delivery.

challenges.issue: Hydration Mismatch Warnings from Browser Extensions
challenges.description: Cosmetic tags injected by browser extensions (e.g. Grammarly, translation plugins) into document body tags caused React SSR hydration failures and console spam.
challenges.solution: Implemented suppressHydrationWarning attributes at the layout root layout body boundaries to safely bypass cosmetic browser adjustments post-rendering.

challenges.description: With comprehensive selector ranges (1D to 10Y options), the dashboard controls would clip and overflow on smaller mobile screens.
challenges.solution: Refactored control panels into flexible wrapped flex grids with responsive layout breakpoints, hiding dividing borders on mobile to keep controls stackable and clean.

challenges.description: Dynamic cryptocurrency exchanges were previously dependent on a mock static JSON rate file, leading to inaccurate calculations.
challenges.solution: Rewrote the exchange calculations to consume active, live React Query market rates, enabling live multi-currency calculations directly in the browser using the formula (Sell Price / Buy Price) * Amount.

architecture_decisions.state_management: Redux Toolkit (master symbols, sidebar active configurations) + TanStack Query v5 (robust caching, invalidation, and deduplication)
architecture_decisions.data_streaming: Binance WebSockets (wss://stream.binance.com:9443) for direct, low-latency browser ticker streaming
architecture_decisions.pwa: Custom Service Worker caching strategy with a beautiful glassmorphic offline.html visual boundary

key_outcomes.offline_availability: App is fully installable on mobile/desktop with reliable offline caching
key_outcomes.resiliency: Zero-downtime API proxy guaranteeing immediate fallback delivery under rate limit peaks
